Other: I only added Bitty Fell!Sans into this bot so that way it would know him, however you'd have to add other bitties via chat memory if you want to specify them. Also the crying bitty isn't supposed to be him, as it is for anyone who wanted to also specify if they owned any other bitty that isn't King or Edgy. Both intos are focused on King & {{user}} however I made it as open ended as possible. Also there is no built in owner for the 2nd written intro, as I wanted yall to be able to curate them.
